candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=83%) but green_matches=0, treat the signal as historically unvalidated and require external regime confirmation before sizing above 50%.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.83 and green_matches == 0 and tradingview_confidence < 0.70: size_multiplier = min(size_multiplier, 0.50)
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
